name: Rogz Dog Grinz Treat Ball 7.8cm Lime Medium
description: Product Overview The Grinz Treat Ball is more than a toy it’s a motivational puzzle that rewards your dog with treats as they nudge, chase, and roll it around. Its signature “grinning teeth” design adds a humorous touch to play sessions, while the bright lime color boosts visibility both indoors and outdoors. Key Features Interactive Treat-Dispensing Design Fill the central cavity with your dog’s favorite treats. As your pet plays, treats are released gradually, keeping them mentally stimulated and physically active. Medium Size (7.8 cm) Ideal for adult dogs and medium breeds. Easy to pick up, carry, and roll. Durable, Pet-Safe Material Made with tough, non-toxic materials built to withstand repeated chewing and rough play while remaining gentle on your dog’s teeth and gums. Bright Lime Color Easy to spot in the yard, park, or around the home, reducing lost-toy frustration. Great for Independent and Bonding Play A perfect companion for fetch, chase, and enrichment activities, helping reduce boredom and destructive behavior. Benefits for Your Dog Encourages problem-solving and mental stimulation Supports physical exercise during play Reduces boredom and helps prevent anxiety-driven behavior Offers a satisfying reward system through treat release Usage Tips Supervise playtime especially with strong chewers to ensure safe use. Choose compatible treats that fit comfortably inside and can dispense easily. Clean regularly with warm water to maintain hygiene and prevent bacteria buildup. Product Details Name: Rogz Dog Grinz Treat Ball SKU: GR04-L Size: 7.8 cm (Medium) Color: Lime
